content: Phase 1: Get Cloudflare R2 integration playbook
Phase 1: Setup Supabase database schema (assets, queue, history tables)
Phase 1: Create POC test script (Supabase auth + R2 upload + DB CRUD)
Phase 1: Run POC and fix until all tests pass
Phase 2: Setup R2 CORS policy for browser PUT uploads
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Build backend (FastAPI + Supabase auth + R2 endpoints + Queue + History)
Phase 2: Build frontend - MCR Layout (Sidebar + Staging/Live + Control Deck)
Phase 2: Build frontend - External Display popup with BroadcastChannel sync
Phase 2: Implement Web Audio API (10-band EQ + Master Gain + Output Routing)
Phase 2: Implement Asset Library upload + management
Phase 2: Implement Queue management with autoplay
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 2: Fix all bugs found in testing
